inputs.businessContext: History of previous low birth weight delivery (1 if yes, 0 if no)

label_i18n.fr: Antécédent de faible poids à la naissance

businessContext_i18n.en: History of previous low birth weight delivery (1 if yes, 0 if no)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki düşük doğum ağırlıklı doğum öyküsü (evet ise 1, hayır ise 0)

formulas.linearPredictor: -3.5 + 0.05 * maternalAge - 0.1 * gestationalAge - 0.03 * prePregnancyBMI + 0.5 * smoking + 1.5 * previousLBW + 0.2 * parity
formulas.linearPredictor_aux: -3.5 + 0.05 * maternalAge - 0.1 * gestationalAge - 0.03 * prePregnancyBMI + 0.5 * smoking + 1.5 * previousLBW + 0.2 * parity
